title: FCoP Skill
description: Per ADR-0027. A Skill is an MCP server (or capability bundle) that agents can invoke. Skill records live in fcop.json under `skills[]`. v1.1 adds `tools[]` sub-array for per-tool risk metadata, enabling runtimes to auto-apply review gates and cost guards without hardcoding tool names.

riskLevel.description: Per ADR-0024/0027. Shared risk level enum for both Task and Skill.tools.

skillTool.description: Per ADR-0027. Risk metadata for a single MCP tool within a Skill.

name.description: MCP tool name. MUST match the tool name as declared in the MCP server manifest.

risk_level.description: Risk level of this tool. Default: low (most read-only tools). high/irreversible triggers review gate (ADR-0025).

irreversible.description: True if this tool's effects cannot be undone (e.g. DROP TABLE, force-push). Runtime MUST wrap irreversible=true calls as review-required tasks.

cost_sensitive.description: True if calling this tool incurs billing or paid API charges. Runtime MAY enforce cost thresholds and trigger needs_human on threshold breach.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of what this tool does.

id.description: Stable skill identifier. Used as the routing key in capability references.

label.description: Human-readable label for this skill. Free text.

uri.description: MCP server URI (e.g. mcp://local/git, mcp://remote/openai). Used by runtimes to locate and connect to the skill.

tools.description: Per ADR-0027. Optional per-tool risk metadata. Absence = all tools assumed low/false/false (most permissive default). Runtimes MAY choose a more conservative default.
